purpose: This JSON spec is used to add new regions: verify with Google Earth Engine (GEE) → create subregions → optionally append to BigQuery. Geometries come from FAO GAUL 2015 level2 (admin2 union) when components are given, else from the bbox rectangle.

regions.description: List of region objects. Each defines one region to add.

gaul_overrides.description: Optional. Maps region name to a map of component-name → GAUL NAME_2 string. Use when your component names do not exactly match FAO GAUL admin2 NAME_2 (e.g. accents, spelling). Keys are region names; values are objects like {"YourComponent": "Exact GAUL NAME_2"}.

region.description: Unique name for the region. Used as key and as parent_region for subregions. No spaces in IDs (use underscores).

bbox.description: Bounding box [lon_min, lat_min, lon_max, lat_max]. Always used: either as the geometry (when no GAUL components) or to filter GAUL features and as fallback.

country.description: Required only when using GAUL via 'components'. Must match FAO GAUL ADM0_NAME for the country (e.g. 'Peru', 'Bolivia'). Used to filter GAUL level2 features. For bbox-only regions, can be omitted or kept for documentation.

components.description: List of admin2 (level2) names to union from FAO GAUL 2015. If present (and country is set), geometry = union of matched GAUL polygons; matching is by NAME_2 (normalized: lowercased, accents stripped, underscores as spaces). If omitted or empty, geometry = bbox rectangle.

area_km2.description: Expected area in km². Used only for verification: if actual GEE area differs from this by more than 25%, a warning is reported. Optional.

gee_notes.description: Free text printed in the verification report. No effect on logic. Optional.

gaul_overrides.description: Optional per-region overrides. Same shape as top-level gaul_overrides but scoped to this region: {"component": "GAUL NAME_2"}. Overrides top-level for this region.

geometry_logic.when_gaul_used: If 'components' is non-empty AND 'country' is set: load FAO/GAUL/2015/level2, filter by bbox and ADM0_NAME == country, match NAME_2 to each component (with optional gaul_overrides). Geometry = union of matched polygons. If any component has no match, fallback to bbox.
geometry_logic.when_bbox_used: If 'components' is omitted, empty, or matching fails: geometry = rectangle from bbox [lon_min, lat_min, lon_max, lat_max].
geometry_logic.normalization_for_matching: Component names and GAUL NAME_2 are normalized: strip, lowercased, accents removed (NFD + strip Mn), underscores replaced with spaces. gaul_overrides map your key to the exact GAUL string you want to match.

regions.gee_notes: Union of admin2 units (GAUL); bbox used as fallback or to filter GAUL
Bbox-only (no components); country kept for clarity, unused for geometry

example_gaul_overrides.description: Use when a component name does not match GAUL NAME_2. Keys in overrides are your component names; values are the exact GAUL NAME_2 strings.
